Enumeration Case# kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDFocus

macOS 10.12+

```
kIOVideoFeatureControlClassIDFocus = 'fcus'
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1646200-anonymous/kiovideofeaturecontrolclassidfocus#discussion)

A IOVideoFeatureControl that controls a focus mechanism. The units for the control's absolute value are meters (m).
